entries.name: branch-reconcile-default-invariant
entries.purpose: Daily at 03:15 UTC. Verifies exactly-one-default per (tenant, organization). Fixes drift by promoting the oldest branch when a tuple has zero defaults + demoting all-but-one when it has multiple. Killable via `branch.reconcile_default_invariant` feature flag.

entries.name: branch-resume-due
entries.purpose: Every 15 minutes. Find Branches with status=paused AND resume_scheduled_for <= now() (stored on the paused_notification or in metadata.resume_scheduled_for); transition to status=active + fire BranchResumed.

entries.name: branch-metrics-snapshot
entries.purpose: Hourly. Compute `stackra.branch.active.count` per status + `stackra.branch.slot_usage` gauges per tenant. Publishes to the OpenTelemetry endpoint.

entries.name: branch-geocoding-stuck-alert
entries.purpose: Every 10 minutes. Alerts ops when > 5 `GeocodeAddressJob` rows are pending for > 30 minutes (signals subprocessor outage or rate-limit exhaustion). Non-critical.

entries.name: branch-close-notice-reminder
entries.purpose: Daily at 09:00 UTC. For every Branch with `closed_date` in the future (i.e. tenant scheduled a future closure), send a reminder notification to the branch's staff 7 days before + 1 day before + on the day. Respects `branch.settings.closure_notice_days` regional floor.
